title: Exochaenium alatum
intro: Exochaenium alatum, commonly known as the winged Exochaenium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The bioactive constituents of Exochaenium alatum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess antioxidant and anticancer activities. In herbal medicine, Exochaenium alatum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
